options.text:
PREREQUISITES REQUIRED 

There are prerequisites that must be setup in your Azure environment to successfully deploy this Custom Image Build. The prerequisites are outlined on the 'Prerequisites' page.

elements.name: resourceGroup
elements.label: Resource Group (for Image Build resources)
elements.toolTip: Select the name of the existing resource group where the image build virtual machines and associated resources will be created.

elements.name: customBuildResourceGroupName
elements.label: Custom Build Resource Group Name
elements.subLabel: Leave blank if you want to allow this deployment to create a resource group automatically named with CAF principals.
elements.toolTip: The custom name of the resource group where the image build and management vms will be created.

constraints.validationMessage: If provided the value must be between 2 and 90 characters.

elements.name: deploymentPrefix
elements.label: Deployment Prefix
elements.toolTip: Provide a prefix (from 2 to 6 characters) for the deployments created by this template.

constraints.validationMessage: The prefix must be between 2 and 6 characters

elements.name: envClassification
elements.label: Env Classification
elements.toolTip: Select the type of environment (Development (dev), Test (test), Production (prod)) for which this solution is being deployed. This information will be use as part of the resources naming. Select (or leave the value as) "Not Specified" to omit this option.

options.text: Prior to deployment, make sure you meet the prerequisites outlined in the resource pre-reqs section in Zero Trust Image solution documentation:

Select the storage account and blob container with the build artifacts (scripts and installers) and the User Assigned Managed Identity that has been assigned the 'Storage Blob Data Reader' role the storage account.

The User Assigned Identity will be assigned the Contributor and Storage Blob Data Contributor roles on the Build Resource Group.

elements.name: storageAccount
elements.label: Image Artifacts Storage Account
elements.toolTip: Select the storage account containing the image customization artifacts (i.e., installers, scripts).

elements.name: container
elements.label: Image Artifacts Container
elements.toolTip: Select the container which contains the software and script blobs.

elements.name: managedIdentity
elements.label: User Assigned Identity
elements.toolTip: Select an existing User Assigned Identity which has been assigned data plane rights of at least 'Storage Blob Data Reader' to the storage account and container selected above.

options.text: Select the Virtual Network and Subnet to which the image build virtual machine will be attached. The Virtual Network options listed below are based on the region selected under 'Image Build Location' on the 'Deployment Basics' page. If you don't find the desired virtual network, change the region on the 'Basics' page.

Virtual machines must be able to resolve the blob private dns zone and route to the storage account endpoint for the storage account selected above. Select the appropriate subnet that meets these requirements.

elements.name: virtualNetwork
elements.label: Image Capture Virtual Network
elements.toolTip: Select an existing virtual network to attach the VM for image capture. If the desired network isn't available be sure to change the region in the Deployment Details section above.

constraints.allowedValues: [map(filter(steps('prereqs').network.virtualNetworksApi.value, (item) => equals(item.location, steps('basics').scope.location.name)), (item) => parse(concat('{"label":"', item.name, '","description":"Resource group: ', first(skip(split(item.id, '/'), 4)), '","value":"', item.id, '"}')))]

elements.name: subnet
elements.label: Image Capture Subnet
elements.toolTip: Select an existing subnet for the image capture.

elements.name: vmSize
elements.label: Virtual Machine Size
elements.toolTip: Select the size of the virtual machines. Multi-session hosts should have 4 - 24 vCPUs. Single session host should have 2 or more vCPUs.

elements.name: encryptionAtHost
elements.label: EncryptionAtHost
elements.toolTip: Check to enable 'EncryptionAtHost' for Disk Encryption.

options.text: In order to deploy a virtual machine with Encryption at Host enabled, the feature must be enabled in your subscription.

elements.name: source
elements.label: Image Source
elements.toolTip: Select the type of image to deploy on the session hosts.

elements.name: offer
elements.label: Offer
elements.toolTip: Select the desired marketplace image offer.

elements.name: sku
elements.label: SKU
elements.toolTip: Select the desired marketplace image SKU.

elements.name: imageDefinition
elements.label: Image Definition
elements.toolTip: Select the desired image definition.

options.text: This page of the wizard allows you to add image customizations by downloading blobs from the storage account and performing the defined actions.

elements.name: installFsLogix
elements.label: Install FsLogix Agent
elements.toolTip: Select 'Yes' to install FsLogix Agent

elements.name: fslogixBlob
elements.toolTip: Select FsLogix Agent blob
elements.label: FsLogix Agent Blob (.zip)

elements.name: installOffice
elements.label: Install Office
elements.toolTip: Select 'Yes' to install Office

elements.name: officeBlob
elements.toolTip: Select Microsoft Office Customization Tool blob
elements.label: Office Deployment Tool (.zip)

elements.name: installAccess
elements.label: Install Access
elements.toolTip: Select 'Yes' to install Access

elements.name: installExcel
elements.label: Install Excel
elements.toolTip: Select 'Yes' to install Excel

elements.name: installOneNote
elements.label: Install OneNote
elements.toolTip: Select 'Yes' to install OneNote

elements.name: installOutlook
elements.label: Install Outlook
elements.toolTip: Select 'Yes' to install Outlook

elements.name: installPowerPoint
elements.label: Install PowerPoint
elements.toolTip: Select 'Yes' to Install PowerPoint

elements.name: installProject
elements.label: Install Project
elements.toolTip: Select 'Yes' to install Project

elements.name: installPublisher
elements.label: Install Publisher
elements.toolTip: Select 'Yes' to install Publisher

elements.name: installSkypeForBusiness
elements.label: Install Skype For Business
elements.toolTip: Select 'Yes' to install Skype For Business

elements.name: installVisio
elements.label: Install Visio
elements.toolTip: Select 'Yes' to install Visio

elements.name: installWord
elements.label: Install Word
elements.toolTip: Select 'Yes' to install Word

elements.name: installOneDrive
elements.label: Install OneDrive (Per Machine)
elements.toolTip: Select 'Yes' to install OneDrive (Per-Machine)

elements.name: onedriveBlob
elements.toolTip: Select Mirosoft OneDrive blob
elements.label: OneDrive Setup (.zip)

elements.name: installTeams
elements.label: Install Teams
elements.toolTip: Select 'True' to install Teams

elements.name: teamsBlob
elements.toolTip: Select Mirosoft Teams blob
elements.label: Teams Installers (.zip)

elements.name: installVirtualDesktopOptimizationTool
elements.label: Apply Virtual Desktop Optimizations
elements.toolTip: Select 'True' to apply the customizations prescribed in the Virtual Desktop Optimization Tool

elements.name: vDotBlob
elements.toolTip: Select vDot blob
elements.label: VDOT Package (.zip)

elements.name: addCustomSoftware
elements.label: Add Custom Software
elements.toolTip: Select 'Yes' to add custom software to the image

options.text: Enter customizations for your image below. The first column is a free-form text field that can only contain alphanumerics and no spaces. The second column is the blob name and is case-sensitive. The third column is for any arguments.

validations.message: Only alphanumerics and dashes (-) are allowed up to 24 characters

elements.name: installUpdates
elements.label: Install Windows Updates
elements.toolTip: Select 'Yes' to install updates and specify an update source.

elements.name: updateService
elements.label: Software update service
elements.toolTip: Select the appropriate update source for your environment.

allowedValues.label: DCAT (Flighting updates like previews, rarely used)

elements.name: wsusServer
elements.label: WSUS Url
elements.toolTip: Specify an accessible WSUS server. Include the port if necessary.

options.text: If you choose to collect logs, a new randomly-named storage account will be created in the build resource group with a blob container called 'image-customization-logs'. All standard and error output will be written to individual blobs and saved for 7 days.
In order to collect logs from the customization scripts and installers you must provide the subnet where the storage account private endpoint will be created and the blob storage private dns zone.

elements.name: collectLogs
elements.label: Collect customization logs in a storage container

elements.name: virtualNetwork
elements.label: Virtual Network
elements.toolTip: Select an existing virtual network for the storage account blob private endpoint. If the desired network isn't available be sure to change the region in the Deployment Details section above.

constraints.allowedValues: [map(filter(steps('imageCustomizations').logging.virtualNetworksApi.value, (item) => equals(item.location, steps('basics').scope.location.name)), (item) => parse(concat('{"label":"', item.name, '","description":"Resource group: ', first(skip(split(item.id, '/'), 4)), '","value":"', item.id, '"}')))]

elements.name: subnet
elements.label: Subnet
elements.toolTip: Select an existing subnet for the image capture.

elements.name: blobPrivateDnsZone
elements.label: Blob Storage Private DNS Zone
elements.toolTip: Select the Azure Blob Storage Private Link Private DNS Zone.

options.text: For image management, this solution will create a new image version of a image (definition) in the Azure Compute Gallery selected on the Basics tab. You have the option to use an existing image definiton or define a new one.

link.label: Learn more about managing images with an Azure Compute Gallery.

elements.name: useExImageDef
elements.label: Use Existing Image Definition
elements.toolTip: Determines if you want to use an existing image definition from the Azure Compute Gallery selected on the 'Prerequisites' page or create a new one.

options.text: The image definition you choose below must have the appropriate features selected for the security type and accelerated networking that you picked on the 'Image Virtual Machine' page.

elements.name: imageDefinition
elements.label: Image Definition
elements.toolTip: Select the existing image definition for which a new image version will be selected. If the desired image definition is not available, check your Compute Gallery selection on the 'Prerequisites' page or select to create a new one above.

options.text: Use the first text box below to provide a custom name for the image definition, if desired. If you leave the custom name blank, then the image definition name will be created based on the 'publisher', 'offer', and 'sku' provided below using CAF naming standards.

elements.name: customImageDefinitionName
elements.label: Custom Image Definition Name
elements.toolTip: The name of the image definition to create in the Image Gallery. Leave blank if you want to allow this deployment to create an image definition in the Image Gallery chosen on the 'Prerequisites' page with a name based on the selections below.

constraints.validationMessage: When provided, the name must be between 2 and 80 characters long and only use valid characters.

elements.name: imageDefinitionPublisher
elements.label: Image Definition Publisher
elements.toolTip: The compute gallery image definition Publisher.

constraints.validationMessage: The value must contain only valid characters, no spaces, and be between 2 and 128 characters in length.

elements.name: imageDefinitionOffer
elements.label: Image Definition Offer
elements.toolTip: The compute gallery image definition Offer.

constraints.validationMessage: The value must contain only valid characters, no spaces, and be between 2 and 64 characters in length.

elements.name: imageDefinitionSku
elements.label: Image Definition Sku
elements.toolTip: The compute gallery image definition Sku.

constraints.validationMessage: The value must contain only valid characters, no spaces, and be between 2 and 64 characters in length.

elements.name: isAcceleratedNetworkSupported
elements.label: Accelerated Networking Supported (Preview)
elements.toolTip: Set to 'Yes' to allow Virtual Machines deployed from the image to use Accelerated Networking. When set to 'Yes' on the Image definition, capturing VMs that don't support accelerated networking is not supported.

elements.name: isHibernateSupported
elements.label: Hibernation Supported (preview)
elements.toolTip: Set this to 'Yes' to enable Virtual Machines to be deployed from this image definition that support hibernation.

elements.name: securityType
elements.label: Security type
elements.toolTip: Choose a type of security that matches your needs: Standard includes basic protections at no additional cost. Trusted launch virtual machines provide additional security features on Gen2 virtual machines to protect against persistent and advanced attacks.

allowedValues.label: Trusted Launch and Confidential VM Supported

elements.name: isNVMeSupported
elements.label: Higher storage performance with NVMe (preview)
elements.toolTip: Set this to 'Yes' to enable the capture of VMs and disks on NVMe storage.

elements.name: useCustomVersion
elements.label: Specify Custom Version Information
elements.toolTip: Select 'Yes' to specify the Major.Minor.Patch version information or 'No' to generate the Image Version based on the Date and Time (i.e., yy.MMdd.mmss).

elements.name: imageMajorVersion
elements.label: Image Major Version
elements.toolTip: Pick the first component of the image version

elements.name: imageMinorVersion
elements.label: Image Minor Version
elements.toolTip: Pick the second component of the image version

elements.name: imagePatch
elements.label: Image Patch
elements.toolTip: Pick the last component of the image version

elements.name: eolDaysFromNow
elements.label: End of Life from today in days
elements.toolTip: Enter the number of days before this image version should be replaced.

elements.name: storageAccountType
elements.label: Storage Account Type
elements.toolTip: Select the storage account type for this image version for every region. If you select 'Standard_ZRS' then all regions will not be available.

elements.name: replicaCount
elements.label: Replica Count
elements.toolTip: Specify the default replica count per region for this image version. If you don't specify additional replication regions, then this value will be used with the deployment location.

elements.name: excludeFromLatest
elements.label: Exclude from Latest
elements.toolTip: Select the value for Exclude from Latest which determines whether this image version will be used when a image resource id uses 'latest' for the version. If you don't specify additional replication regions, then this value will be used with the deployment location.

elements.name: specifyReplicationRegions
elements.label: Specify more than one location where the image version should be stored?

constraints.allowedValues: [if(equals(steps('imageDest').imageVersion.storageAccountType, 'Standard_LRS'), map(first(map(filter(steps('basics').computeApi.value, (resourceTypes) => equals(resourceTypes.resourceType, 'galleries/images/versions')), (item) => item.locations)), (item) => parse(concat('{"label":"', item, '","value":"', toLower(replace(item, ' ', '')), '"}'))), map(filter(first(map(filter(steps('basics').storageApi.value, (resourceTypes) => equals(resourceTypes.resourceType, 'storageAccounts')), (item) => item.zoneMappings)), (item) => equals(length(item.zones), 3)), (item) => parse(concat('{"label":"', item.location, '","value":"', toLower(replace(item.location, ' ', '')), '"}'))))]

options.text: Use the grid below to add All replication regions and the associated values. To add rows, toggle one of the drop down boxes.

constraints.allowedValues: [if(equals(steps('imageDest').imageVersion.storageAccountType, 'Standard_LRS'), map(first(map(filter(steps('basics').computeApi.value, (resourceTypes) => equals(resourceTypes.resourceType, 'galleries/images/versions')), (item) => item.locations)), (item) => parse(concat('{"label":"', item, '","value":"', toLower(replace(item, ' ', '')), '"}'))), map(filter(first(map(filter(steps('basics').storageApi.value, (resourceTypes) => equals(resourceTypes.resourceType, 'storageAccounts')), (item) => item.zoneMappings)), (item) => equals(length(item.zones), 3)), (item) => parse(concat('{"label":"', item.location, '","value":"', toLower(replace(item.location, ' ', '')), '"}'))))]
